fields.label: Entry Group
fields.description: Entries in the same group must balance (total debit = total credit)

fields.label: Account
fields.description: Static GL account. Leave blank to use Account Field instead.

fields.label: Account Field
fields.description: Read account from document field, e.g. doc.credit_to, doc.debit_to

fields.label: Debit Formula
fields.description: Python expression for debit amount, e.g. doc.base_grand_total

fields.label: Credit Formula
fields.description: Python expression for credit amount, e.g. doc.base_grand_total

fields.label: Party Field
fields.description: Read party from document field, e.g. doc.supplier

fields.label: Cost Center
fields.description: Static cost center. Leave blank to use Cost Center Field.

fields.label: Cost Center Field
fields.description: Read cost center from document field, e.g. doc.cost_center

fields.label: Remarks
fields.description: Optional remarks for the GL entry
